title: henckelia lacei
intro: Henckelia lacei, also known as the Indian tongue plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Henckelia lacei can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief to individuals suffering from various health conditions.
